programme.desc: Different generations discover love in unique ways, shaping a story that evolves with time, reflecting tradition, change and the constant pull of family.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her personal ambitions to dedicate her life to her family. However, she eventually decides to live on her own terms after failing to receive credit for her many trials.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.desc: Jhanak tries to overcome her underprivileged background to fulfil her dream of becoming a dancer. However, a man she once rejected is out for revenge against her.
programme.title: Jhanak

programme.desc: Virat is an IPS officer who loves Pakhi deeply. However, things become complicated when he has to let go of his love, Pakhi, and marry Sai.
programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin

programme.desc: Unfathomable circumstances thrust a self-willed, affluent young man and a woman from a humble background into getting married to each other.
programme.title: Shaadi Sharte Lagu

programme.desc: After their marriage, Sooraj, a self-made man, supports and encourages Sandhya to achieve her dream of becoming an IPS officer despite his family's scepticism.
programme.title: Diya Aur Baati Hum

programme.desc: Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.
programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha

programme.desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
